name: Whole Roasted Chicken Stuffed with Dirty Rice
recipeInstructions:
Note: See the "Emeril's Essence Information" and "Alligator Stewed In Sauce Piquant" recipes which are included in this collection.
Preheat oven to 400 degrees. Rub entire chicken with 2 tablespoons olive oil and season with Emeril's Essence.
In a saucepan, boil gizzards, covered with water for about 1 hour or until tender. Drain gizzards and reserve liquid. Finely chop the gizzards in a food processor.
In a large saucepan, cook 2 tablespoons of oil and flour over heat to make a dark roux (8-10 minutes). Add pork and cook 5-6 minutes. Add onions, bell peppers, celery, and cook 5-6 minutes until vegetables wilt. Add chopped gizzards.
Pour remaining liquid into a measuring cup. Mix with water to desired amount. Add to pot. Stir in cooked rice, green onions, parsley, salt, and cayenne pepper.
Allow mixture to cool. Stuff chicken completely. Place on roasting pan and roast for about 45 minutes or until juices run clear.
Spoon sauce into center of plate. Arrange carved chicken and stuffing around the sauce. Garnish with chives.
This recipe serves 6.
